_comment: Single source of truth for every real contact/card link used by the wallet-pass generator scripts. Edit values here — generate_wallet_pass.js, generate_google_wallet_pass.js, and src/utils/google-wallet-generator.js all read from this file instead of hardcoding their own copies.

person.name: Wong Soon Fook
person.title: Founder & Digital Builder
person.whatsappMessage: Hi Soon Fook, I found your digital card and would like to connect!
